Building intelligent agents
that ship in production

AI Engineer & Founder with 2+ years deploying LLM-powered systems. 15+ agents shipped. Multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, and production AI infrastructure.

About

Founder. Engineer. Agent Builder.

I am an AI Engineer with founder-level ownership. Over the past two years, I have built and deployed 15+ AI agents into production — from multi-agent swarms for technical due diligence to RAG-powered candidate matching systems processing 200+ documents daily.

As CTO of F1 Dream Jobs, I architected a fullstack AI CRM from scratch (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, GPT-4) and onboarded 220+ candidates onto LLM-powered tools. As founder of Velden Health, I built AI systems for healthcare revenue recovery handling 1,000+ insurance claims.

I am currently pursuing a Doctor of Business Administration at Taylor's University (weekend classes) to deepen my strategic leadership capabilities — with a 5-7 year trajectory toward CTO/CAO roles in AI-driven organizations.

I am targeting Singapore-based AI Engineering roles (with EP sponsorship) or remote contracts from Malaysia. My compensation target is SGD 96K–144K/year.

Projects

100 AI Agents in 100 Days

A subset of the 15+ agents shipped into production. Each project demonstrates a different facet of AI engineering — from multi-agent orchestration to document intelligence.

$25K → $0.05

GitPulse AI

4-agent swarm for GitHub technical due diligence. Planner, Coder, Reviewer, and Scorer agents collaborate to replace $25K manual audits at $0.05 per analysis.

Multi-AgentNode.jsGroqGitHub API
View Project
200+ CVs/day

F1 Dream Jobs CRM

Fullstack AI CRM built from scratch. RAG-powered semantic candidate matching, GPT-4 integration, and automated outreach. Processes 200+ CVs daily.

ReactNode.jsGPT-4Vector DB
View Project
Real-time

ScenarioMind

Multi-agent business simulation engine with debate architecture. Agents negotiate, strategize, and adapt based on opponent moves — deployed on Vercel Serverless.

TypeScriptVercelGroqSimulation
View Project
80+ red flags

ContractScan AI

60+ clause contract parsing with 80+ red flag detection and transparent risk scoring (0-100). RAG-based legal context retrieval.

PythonNLPDocument AI
View Project
Zero LLM core

SelfHeal AI

Production code error detection with 200+ rule knowledge base and zero LLM dependency core. Reliable, auditable, and hallucination-free.

PythonStatic AnalysisRule Engine
View Project
Auto-optimize

FlowMap

AI-powered process mining for business automation. Identifies bottlenecks, suggests optimizations, and generates improvement reports.

PythonProcess MiningAutomation
